indications.text:
OXLUMO is indicated for the treatment of primary hyperoxaluria type 1 (PH1) to lower urinary
and plasma oxalate levels in pediatric and adult patients [see Clinical Pharmacology (12.1),
Clinical Studies (14.1, 14.2, 14.3)].

OXLUMO is indicated for the treatment of primary hyperoxaluria type 1 (PH1) to lower urinary
and plasma oxalate levels in pediatric and adult patients [see Clinical Pharmacology (12.1),
Clinical Studies (14.1, 14.2, 14.3)].
